creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/snapshots/> 

The reference to 
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/mirrors#mirrors-http> 
scrolls down only one line or so. It might as well be: 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/mirrors>

Two references are outdated, they mislead to the front page of the FreeBSD Handbook: 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#CURRENT>

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#STABLE>
